info.title: TalkifAI API
info.description: Build and manage AI voice and chat agents programmatically.

bearerAuth.description: Your TalkifAI API key. Get it from Studio → Settings → API Keys.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: Used only for POST /chat/sessions (session creation). Your tk_live_... key.

model.description: LLM model. Set for pipeline and text architectures; null for realtime.

stt.description: Speech-to-text provider. Set for pipeline; null for realtime and text.

voiceId.description: TTS voice ID. Required for pipeline; optional for realtime (used only when greetingType is agentFirst).

realtimeProvider.description: Realtime provider. Set for realtime architecture; null for pipeline and text.

sysMsg.example: You are a helpful customer support agent for Acme Corp. Be concise and friendly.

greetingType.description: Controls who speaks first when the call connects.

greetingMessage.example: Hello! How can I help you today?
greetingMessage.description: Opening message spoken by the agent. Only used when greetingType is agentFirst.

inactivityTimeout.description: Seconds of user silence before the agent ends the call. Range: 10–60.

lastMessage.example: Is there anything else I can help you with?
lastMessage.description: Final message spoken by the agent before ending the call.

mode.description: Visibility mode. public: all org members. private: creator + admins/owners only. commercial: globally accessible.

enabledFunctions.description: IDs of built-in functions enabled for this agent.

enabledCustomFunctions.description: IDs of custom (webhook) functions enabled for this agent.

languages.description: Languages the agent is configured to support.

userId.description: ID of the user who created this agent.

organizationId.description: ID of the organization this agent belongs to.

get.description: Returns all agents in your organization.

post.description: Creates a new agent. Supported architectures: pipeline, realtime, text.

systemPrompt.example: You are a helpful sales agent...

value.name: Customer Support
value.systemPrompt: You are a helpful customer support agent for Acme Corp.

value.name: Low Latency Bot
value.systemPrompt: You are a fast-responding support agent.

value.name: Website Chatbot
value.systemPrompt: You are a helpful website assistant.

get.description: Returns full details for a specific agent.

403.description: Forbidden. Either the caller is not a member of the agent's organization, or the agent is private and the caller is not its creator or an org admin/owner.

patch.description: Updates one or more fields on an agent. Send only the fields you want to change.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an agent. This action cannot be undone.

post.description: Triggers an outbound voice call from your registered phone number to a destination. The `from_number` must have an outbound agent assigned in Studio → Phone Numbers.

parameters.name: to_number
parameters.description: Destination phone number in E.164 format

parameters.name: from_number
parameters.description: Your registered TalkifAI phone number in E.164 format

400.description: Invalid phone number format or text-only agent assigned

value.detail: Agent 'Chat Bot' is a text-only agent and cannot make voice calls

404.description: Phone number not found or no outbound agent assigned

example.detail: Phone number +12025550100 not found or has no outbound agent assigned

408.description: Call timed out — not answered within 60 seconds

500.description: Internal server error or SIP trunk failure

get.description: Returns all call sessions for your active organization including transcripts, post-call analysis, cost breakdowns, daily usage, and per-agent usage. Requires an active organization in session.

403.description: Not a member of the selected organization

get.description: Returns your current voice minutes usage and remaining quota for the billing period.
Returns full details for a specific call session, including post-call analysis if available.
Returns the full conversation transcript for a completed call.

post.description:
Creates a new text chat session. Returns a session token for authenticating subsequent messages.

**Auth:** Use `X-API-Key` header (not `Authorization: Bearer`) for this endpoint. Call from your backend server only.

agent_id.description: ID of a Text architecture agent

greeting.example: Hello! How can I help you today?

post.description:
Sends a user message and streams the agent's response via Server-Sent Events (SSE).

**Auth:** Use `Authorization: Bearer {session_token}` (the token from Create Session).

The response is a `text/event-stream`. Each event has `event:` and `data:` lines separated by blank lines.

get.description: Returns the conversation history for a chat session.

post.description: Ends the chat session. Triggers billing finalization, memory ingestion (Graphiti), post-call analysis, and webhooks.
Create a new batch calling job by uploading a CSV file or sending contacts via JSON. Supports up to 10,000 contacts.

file.description: CSV file with contacts (must have 'phone' column)

fromPhoneNumberId.description: Phone number ID to call from

get.description: Returns a paginated list of batch calling jobs for an organization.
Get complete details of a batch job including progress stats and paginated contacts.

post.description: Cancel a scheduled, pending, or running batch job. Stops new calls and marks remaining contacts as cancelled.

400.description: Cannot cancel job in terminal status

post.description: Manually start a scheduled or pending batch job immediately, bypassing the scheduled start time.

400.description: Cannot start job in invalid status

patch.description: Reschedule a scheduled or pending batch job to a new start time.

parameters.name: timezone
parameters.description: IANA timezone for the scheduled time

value.detail: Scheduled time must be in the future

get.description: Get Redis job status for debugging scheduled batch jobs. Verifies if job exists in Redis defer queue.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create and manage voice and chat agents

tags.name: Voice Calls
tags.description: Initiate outbound calls and retrieve call data

tags.name: Text Chat
tags.description: Text chat sessions via REST + SSE
